title: router-hosts-operator Design
summary: Technical design for a Kubernetes operator that syncs Ingress/IngressRoute hostnames to a router-hosts server via gRPC/mTLS.
notes: Path is docs/plans (design plan) but content is implementation contracts: CRD schemas, gRPC API integration, architecture. Classified SPEC over DOC due to concrete data models and contracts. Status: Draft, so not locked.
